name: Wild Mushroom Broth (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound mixed wild and domestic mushrooms or one, all but 2 domestic mushroom caps cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried porcini and warm water in a skillet. Bring to a simmer.
2. Let the mixture soak for 20 minutes or until tender. Use this time to prepare your scallop and raddichio salad if desired.
3. Drain the soaked porcini, rinse to remove any grit, and chop them.
4. Strain the soaking liquid through a paper-lined sieve to remove any grit; set aside.
5. Heat olive oil in a pan. Add the minced shallots and sauté until softened.
6. Add all but the reserved mushroom caps, cover, and cook over low heat or until the mushrooms are tender.
7. Stir in the minced soaked porcini, reserved liquid, and chicken broth. Bring to a simmer and season to taste.
8. Garnish with sliced raw mushrooms.
Yield: 2 servings
